# ISO 11783-9 Tractor ECU semantic snapshot fixtures.
#
# These are not wire payloads: src/isobus/tractor_ecu.rs contains the
# classification/configuration records for composing a TECU from lower-level
# wire codecs. Maintain-power wire bytes live in
# tests/fixtures/j1939/heartbeat_maintain_power.hex.

classification_default=Class 1
classification_class2_nf=Class 2NF
classification_class3_all=Class 3NFGPM
classification_class3_all_version=2
classification_class3_all_instance=1
power_default_shutdown_ms=180000
power_default_maintain_timeout_ms=2000
power_default_ecu_pwr_current_amps=15
power_default_pwr_current_amps=50
tecu_default_facilities_interval_ms=2000
tecu_default_status_interval_ms=100
tecu_default_enable_gateway=false
maintain_request_at_timeout_expired=false
maintain_request_after_timeout_expired=true
power_state_default=PowerOff
